TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang gnaalu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 801 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 243 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 558 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 4%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na gnaalu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na gnaalu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na gnaalu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gnaalu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gnaalu hya' ga Mabuwakay. tay 'llaw na gnaalu hya' ga Cikeliwan. tay 'zil na gnaalu hya' ga Hacining. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣnaalu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa maβuwakaj. taj ʔllaw na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. taj ʔzil na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang gnaalu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 801 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 243 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 558 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 4%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na gnaalu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na gnaalu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na gnaalu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gnaalu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na gnaalu hya' ga Mabuwakay. tay 'llaw na gnaalu hya' ga Cikeliwan. tay 'zil na gnaalu hya' ga Hacining. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣnaalu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa maβuwakaj. taj ʔllaw na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. taj ʔzil na ɣnaalu ħjaʔ ɣa ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
